title: 2023 Bestie Predictions!
description:
(0:00) Bestie New Year catch-up!

(2:44) Prediction 1: 2023's biggest political winner

(17:25) Prediction 2: 2023's biggest political loser

(21:57) Prediction 3: 2023's biggest business winner

(42:03) Prediction 5: 2023's biggest business deal

(52:41) Prediction 6: 2023's most contrarian belief

(1:03:03) Prediction 7: 2023's best-performing asset

(1:07:50) Prediction 8: 2023's worst-performing asset

(1:14:46) Prediction 9: 2023's most anticipated trend

(1:21:40) Prediction 10: 2023's most anticipated media

(1:27:07) Breaking news: OpenAI reportedly in talks to sell existing shares at a ~$29B valuation

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast hosts discuss their predictions for 2023, covering politics, business, and technology. They share their insights on the biggest winners and losers of the year, as well as the most anticipated trends and assets. The hosts also break down recent news, including OpenAI's potential sale at a $29 billion valuation.

takeaways.text: OpenAI may sell shares at a $29B valuation
2023's biggest business winner could be a hedge fund
2023's biggest business loser could be a tech company
The hosts predict a significant business deal in 2023
The best-performing asset in 2023 may be a commodity
The worst-performing asset in 2023 may be a stock
The hosts discuss the potential for a new trend in 2023
The most anticipated media in 2023 could be a new streaming service

sentiment.notes: The hosts seem enthusiastic about their predictions and the potential for growth in 2023. However, they also acknowledge potential risks and challenges.

notable_moments.description: OpenAI's potential sale at a $29 billion valuation
Prediction of a significant business deal in 2023
